title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - No
scenario: Tapping "No" on confirmation popup for Clear Trusted Devices in Reset Device settings does not clear the list and keeps headset connected
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Observe confirmation popup: 'Device power off is required. Your activity and call may be interrupted. Do you want to proceed?' with 'No' and 'Yes' buttons
expected: The confirmation popup closes. The headset's trusted devices list is not cleared. The headset remains connected.
